---
title: "Synoptic LE: Tree Fluxes 2022"
author: "Roberta Peixoto"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
output-dir: "2022/PDF"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(openxlsx)
library(arrow)
library(purrr)
library(lubridate)
library(kableExtra)
```

## Read in and collate all the files in the Processed Data folder

```{r, include = FALSE}

ch4 <- read.csv(
  "Processed Data/COMPASS_Synoptic_LE_TreeStem_Fluxes_Final_2022_CH4.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)


ch4 <-ch4 %>%
  mutate(
    TIMESTAMP     = ymd_hms(TIMESTAMP),
    TIMESTAMP_min = ymd_hms(TIMESTAMP_min),
    TIMESTAMP_max = ymd_hms(TIMESTAMP_max),
    #TIMESTAMP_min = mdy_hm(TIMESTAMP_min),
    #TIMESTAMP_max = mdy_hm(TIMESTAMP_max),
    Date  = ymd(Date),
    #Date  = mdy(Date),
    Site  = factor(str_trim(Site)),
    Zone  = factor(str_trim(Zone)),
    Month = factor(str_trim(Month), levels = month.abb),

    Replicate  = as.integer(Replicate),
    Row_ID    = as.integer(Row_ID),
    Plot_clean = str_trim(Plot_clean),

   # ch4_qaqc_flag = NA_character_
  ) %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ paste0("ch4_", .x),
    matches("^(HM81_|lin_|poly_|rob_)")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TIMESTAMP = round(TIMESTAMP_min, "secs")
  )



co2 <- read.csv("Processed Data/COMPASS_Synoptic_LE_TreeStem_Fluxes_Final_2022_CO2.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

co2 <-co2 %>%
  mutate(
    TIMESTAMP     = ymd_hms(TIMESTAMP),
    TIMESTAMP_min = ymd_hms(TIMESTAMP_min),
    TIMESTAMP_max = ymd_hms(TIMESTAMP_max),
    #TIMESTAMP_min = mdy_hm(TIMESTAMP_min),
    #TIMESTAMP_max = mdy_hm(TIMESTAMP_max),
    Date  = ymd(Date),
    #Date  = mdy(Date),
    Site  = factor(str_trim(Site)),
    Zone  = factor(str_trim(Zone)),
    Month = factor(str_trim(Month), levels = month.abb),

    Replicate  = as.integer(Replicate),
    Row_ID    = as.integer(Row_ID),
    Plot_clean = str_trim(Plot_clean),

  #  co2_qaqc_flag = NA_character_
  ) %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ paste0("co2_", .x),
    matches("^(HM81_|lin_|poly_|rob_)")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    TIMESTAMP = round(TIMESTAMP_min, "secs")
  )

# Combine all files
all_dat <- left_join(
  co2,
  ch4,
  by = c(
    "Plot_clean",
    "Site",
    "Zone",
    "Month",
    "Replicate",
     "Date",
    "Row_ID",
    "TIMESTAMP",
    "TIMESTAMP_min",
    "TIMESTAMP_max"
  )
)

```

## Remove bad fluxes and calculate how many there were

```{r}

##Remove any samples with Flags in the final qaqc_flag columns
final_dat <- all_dat %>% 
  filter(!grepl("TRUE", CH4_rejected_model, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("TRUE", CO2_flux_rejected , ignore.case = TRUE)) 

##Removed both CH4 and CO2 obs when CO2 fluxes were negative and when visual checks showed weird bumps and chamber leak. 

# count before and after filtering
n_total_co2  <- nrow(all_dat)
n_total_ch4  <- nrow(all_dat)

final_dat <- all_dat %>%
  filter(CH4_rejected_model == FALSE | is.na(CH4_rejected_model)) %>%
  filter(CO2_flux_rejected  == FALSE | is.na(CO2_flux_rejected))

n_final      <- nrow(final_dat)
n_removed_co2 <- sum(all_dat$CO2_flux_rejected  == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
n_removed_ch4 <- sum(all_dat$CH4_rejected_model == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
n_removed_either <- n_total_co2 - n_final

# build summary table
filter_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Total observations (joined dataset)",
    "CO2 — observations rejected (n)",
    "CO2 — observations rejected (%)",
    "CH4 — observations rejected (n)",
    "CH4 — observations rejected (%)",
    "Removed by both flags simultaneously (n)",
    "Total unique observations removed (n)",
    "Total unique observations removed (%)",
    "Final observations retained (n)"
  ),
  Value = c(
    n_total_co2,
    n_removed_co2,
    round(100 * n_removed_co2    / n_total_co2, 1),
    n_removed_ch4,
    round(100 * n_removed_ch4    / n_total_co2, 1),
    sum(all_dat$CO2_flux_rejected == TRUE & 
        all_dat$CH4_rejected_model == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_removed_either,
    round(100 * n_removed_either / n_total_co2, 1),
    n_final
  )
)

filter_summary %>%
  kable(
    caption  = "Post-Join QA/QC Filtering Summary",
    align    = c("l", "r"),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    format   = "latex"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"),
    full_width    = FALSE
  ) %>%
  pack_rows("CO2 flags",          2, 3) %>%
  pack_rows("CH4 flags",          4, 5) %>%
  pack_rows("Combined filtering", 6, 9)

```

## Write out files

```{r write out combined data and metadata, include=FALSE}

#write out a csv of all the data to the main folder: 
write.csv(all_dat, "COMPASS_Synoptic_LE_Tree_Fluxes_2022.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

## All Data by Year, Site and Zone

```{r Visualize Data, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=10, dpi = 300}

data_plotting <- all_dat

#Order by Zone from Upland to Surface Water
data_plotting$Zone = factor(data_plotting$Zone, levels = c("UP", "TR"))
data_plotting <- data_plotting[order(data_plotting$Zone), ]

#Order by Site from CRC, PTR, OWC order, which is less to more protected from the efects of the lake water level fluctuation
data_plotting$Site = factor(data_plotting$Site, levels = c("CRC", "PTR", "OWC"))
data_plotting <- data_plotting[order(data_plotting$Site), ]

#Plot samples to get a first look at concentrations 
#group the data for plotting
data_plotting_all <- data_plotting %>%
  group_by(Zone, Site) %>%
  mutate(row_num = factor(row_number())) %>%  # create row_num as factor per group
  ungroup()

# data_plotting_all$Date <- as.Date(paste(data_plotting_all$Year, data_plotting_all$Month, data_plotting_all$Day, sep = "-"))


#Plot data and change colors based on Zone:
viz_ch4_plot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = row_num, y = ch4_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge2(preserve = "total")) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "CH4", title = "CH4 Fluxes by Site") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

 viz_ch4_plot
 
 viz_co2_plot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = row_num, y = co2_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge2(preserve = "total")) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "CO2", title = "CO2 Fluxes by Site") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

 viz_co2_plot


```

## Boxplot summary by Date

```{r Overall Boxplot by Date, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=10, dpi = 300}

data_plotting_all <- data_plotting_all %>% 
    mutate(
    Zone_1 = case_when(
      Zone == "UP" ~ "Upland",
      Zone == "TR" ~ "Transition",
      TRUE ~ Zone  # keep everything else unchanged
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(Zone_1 = factor(Zone_1, levels = c("Upland", "Transition"))) %>%
  mutate(TIMESTAMP=as.POSIXct(TIMESTAMP))%>%
  mutate(Date = paste0(format(TIMESTAMP, "%Y"), format(TIMESTAMP, "%m")))


##Summarize by Date, Site, and Zone
viz_ch4_boxplot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = Date, y = ch4_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Zone_1)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales = "free", nrow = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Upland" = "#20063B",
    "Transition" = "#FFBC42"), 
  labels = c("Upland", "Transition")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "CH4", title = "Summary Boxplot of CH4 by Site and Zone") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))
  

viz_ch4_boxplot


##Summarize by Date, Site, and Zone
viz_co2_boxplot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = Date, y = co2_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Zone_1)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales = "free", nrow = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Upland" = "#20063B",
    "Transition" = "#FFBC42"), 
  labels = c("Upland", "Transition")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "CO2", title = "Summary Boxplot of CO2 by Site and Zone") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

viz_co2_boxplot


```

## Boxplot summary by Site

```{r Overall Boxplot, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=10, dpi = 300}

##Summarize NPOC by Date, Site, and Zone
viz_ch4_summary_boxplot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = Zone_1, y = ch4_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Zone_1)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales = "free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Upland" = "#20063B",
    "Transition" = "#FFBC42"), 
    labels = c("Upland", "Transition")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "CH4", title = "Summary Boxplot of CH4 by Site and Zone") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

viz_ch4_summary_boxplot


##Summarize TDN by Date, Site, and Zone
viz_co2_summary_boxplot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = Zone_1, y = co2_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Zone_1)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales = "free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Upland" = "#20063B",
    "Transition" = "#FFBC42"), 
    labels = c("Upland", "Transition")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "CO2", title = "Summary Boxplot of CO2 by Site and Zone") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

viz_co2_summary_boxplot


```

## Calculate summary metrics

```{r Additional summary metrics, include=FALSE, dpi = 300}

##Metrics for each site and zone for all depths and years
summary <- data_plotting_all %>%
  group_by(Site, Zone_1) %>%
   reframe(
     min_ch4 = min(ch4_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_ch4 = max(ch4_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_ch4 = mean(ch4_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_ch4 = sd(ch4_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE), 

     min_co2 = min(co2_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_co2 = max(co2_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_co2 = mean(co2_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_co2 = sd(co2_lin_flux.estimate, na.rm=TRUE))
```

## Summary Tables

```{r Summary table metrics, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 100}

kable(
  summary[, c("Site", "Zone_1", "min_ch4",	"max_ch4",	"mean_ch4", "min_co2",	"max_co2",	"mean_co2")],  
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "Summary Statistics"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 12
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%   # header
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)


```
